Quality Education.reason: The course directly focuses on advanced Chinese language testing and assessment, fundamentally improving teaching and learning outcomes, and training qualified teachers (Targets 4.3, 4.4, 4.c).
evidence: 測驗與評量不僅是教學的重要環節
